bio: Potter was first spotted in 2018 and was a bit of a roamer before being TNR’d in June 2020. After battling a skin condition that later worsened, he spent weeks at the vet before finally finding his place. In June 2021, he moved in with one of our feeders, and has been an absolute cuddle bug since then, everyone that meets him, absolutely adores him. He is such a welcome addition to the family.
